testcase.name: how-to-check detection > detects "how to check?" as how-to-check
how-to-check detection > detects "How do I test that?" as how-to-check
how-to-check detection > detects "how can I measure voltage" as how-to-check
how-to-check detection > detects "how should I verify the ground" as how-to-check
how-to-check detection > detects "как проверить" as how-to-check
how-to-check detection > detects "как мне протестировать" as how-to-check
how-to-check detection > detects "cómo puedo verificar" as how-to-check
how-to-check detection > detects "explain how to do that" as how-to-check
how-to-check detection > detects "tell me how" as how-to-check
how-to-check detection > does NOT detect "fuse is blown" as how-to-check
how-to-check detection > does NOT detect "12.6 volts" as how-to-check
how-to-check detection > does NOT detect "yes ground is good" as how-to-check
how-to-check detection > does NOT detect "already checked" as how-to-check
how-to-check detection > does NOT detect "I can't check that" as how-to-check
how-to-check handling in processUserMessage > returns howToCheckRequested=true and does NOT close any step
how-to-check handling in processUserMessage > includes HOW-TO-CHECK INSTRUCTION in registry context
how-to-check handling in processUserMessage > clears howToCheckRequested on the next normal message
getStepHowToCheck > returns instruction for a valid step
getStepHowToCheck > returns null for step without instruction
step de-dupe guard > markStepAsked returns true for first ask, false for duplicate
step de-dupe guard > isStepAlreadyAsked tracks correctly
awning procedure order > exists and has correct step ordering
awning procedure order > asks supply and fuse BEFORE motor direct power test
awning procedure order > motor direct test (awn_6) requires motor voltage (awn_5) as prerequisite
awning procedure order > awning fuse step is asked before switch step
electrical_12v procedure order > has supply and fuse/CB steps before direct power test
electrical_12v procedure order > direct power test requires voltage step as prerequisite
portal-cause correctness > when fuse is blown, context does NOT skip to motor steps
portal-cause correctness > key finding 'blown fuse' triggers pivot (immediate isolation)
Prompt Files > should have SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt
Prompt Files > should have MODE_PROMPT_DIAGNOSTIC.txt
Prompt Files > should have MODE_PROMPT_AUTHORIZATION.txt
Prompt Files > should have MODE_PROMPT_FINAL_REPORT.txt
Prompt Composer > composePrompt > should compose diagnostic mode prompt
Prompt Composer > composePrompt > should compose authorization mode prompt
Prompt Composer > composePrompt > should compose final_report mode prompt
Prompt Composer > composePrompt > should include additional constraints when provided
Prompt Composer > detectModeCommand > should detect final report aliases (exact match)
Prompt Composer > detectModeCommand > should detect authorization aliases (exact match)
Prompt Composer > detectModeCommand > should be case-insensitive and whitespace tolerant
Prompt Composer > detectModeCommand > should return null for non-exact matches
Prompt Composer > buildMessagesWithMemory > should build messages with memory window
Prompt Composer > buildMessagesWithMemory > should truncate history to memory window
Prompt Composer > Constants > should export PROHIBITED_WORDS
Prompt Composer > Constants > should export DEFAULT_MEMORY_WINDOW
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > composePrompt (from prompt-composer) > should include dialogue language in context
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > composePrompt (from prompt-composer) > should include diagnostic mode content
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > composePrompt (from prompt-composer) > should include final_report mode content
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt content > should contain LANGUAGE RULES section
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt content > should contain WORDING SAFETY section
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt content > should contain BEHAVIOR RULES section
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt content > should contain FORMAT RULES section
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt content > should NOT be a chatbot
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > MODE_PROMPT_DIAGNOSTIC.txt content > should list complex equipment
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > MODE_PROMPT_DIAGNOSTIC.txt content > should enforce step-by-step procedure rule
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > MODE_PROMPT_DIAGNOSTIC.txt content > should prohibit unauthorized actions in diagnostic mode
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > MODE_PROMPT_DIAGNOSTIC.txt content > should contain POST-REPAIR RULE
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > MODE_PROMPT_DIAGNOSTIC.txt content > should contain MECHANICAL SYSTEM RULE
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > MODE_PROMPT_DIAGNOSTIC.txt content > should contain CONSUMER APPLIANCE RULE
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > MODE_PROMPT_DIAGNOSTIC.txt content > should enforce RV terminology and battery-type question
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > MODE_PROMPT_DIAGNOSTIC.txt content > should limit non-complex unit teardown
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > MODE_PROMPT_FINAL_REPORT.txt content > should require translation separator
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > MODE_PROMPT_FINAL_REPORT.txt content > should specify required section headers
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > MODE_PROMPT_FINAL_REPORT.txt content > should require labor breakdown
Runtime System Prompt (SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE.txt) > MODE_PROMPT_FINAL_REPORT.txt content > should enforce plain format
Runtime Output Validators (mode-validators.ts) > validateDiagnosticOutput > should detect final-report drift during diagnostics
Runtime Output Validators (mode-validators.ts) > validateDiagnosticOutput > should detect isolation-complete language
Runtime Output Validators (mode-validators.ts) > validateDiagnosticOutput > should detect translation separator in diagnostic mode
Runtime Output Validators (mode-validators.ts) > validateDiagnosticOutput > should detect too many questions (>2)
Runtime Output Validators (mode-validators.ts) > validateDiagnosticOutput > should allow valid single-question diagnostic output
Runtime Output Validators (mode-validators.ts) > validateDiagnosticOutput > should allow valid English diagnostic output
Runtime Output Validators (mode-validators.ts) > validateLanguageConsistency > should detect English output during Russian session
Runtime Output Validators (mode-validators.ts) > validateLanguageConsistency > should allow Russian output during Russian session
Runtime Output Validators (mode-validators.ts) > validateLanguageConsistency > should detect Cyrillic in English session
Runtime Output Validators (mode-validators.ts) > validateFinalReportOutput > should detect missing translation separator when required
Runtime Output Validators (mode-validators.ts) > validateFinalReportOutput > should detect numbered lists in final report
Runtime Output Validators (mode-validators.ts) > validateFinalReportOutput > should allow proper final report format
Runtime Output Validators (mode-validators.ts) > validateOutput dispatcher > should route diagnostic mode to validateDiagnosticOutput
Runtime Output Validators (mode-validators.ts) > validateOutput dispatcher > should reject empty output
API Contract > State inference from history > should default to DIAGNOSTICS for empty history
API Contract > State inference from history > should detect CAUSE_OUTPUT from history with translation
API Contract > Language parameter handling > should accept explicit dialogueLanguage
API Contract > Language parameter handling > should fallback to inferred language when not provided
API Contract > State parameter handling > should accept explicit currentState
API Contract > State parameter handling > should fallback to inferred state when not provided
Complex Equipment Classification (from MODE_PROMPT_DIAGNOSTIC) > should list all complex equipment types
Complex Equipment Classification (from MODE_PROMPT_DIAGNOSTIC) > should list water pump as NON-complex equipment
Tone Adjustment - Prompt Files > SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE: no default 'Thank you' instruction
Tone Adjustment - Prompt Files > SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE: has professional tone instructions
Tone Adjustment - Prompt Files > MODE_PROMPT_DIAGNOSTIC: no 'Thank you' default
Tone Adjustment - Prompt Files > MODE_PROMPT_DIAGNOSTIC: has procedure and registry rules
Tone Adjustment - Prompt Files > MODE_PROMPT_DIAGNOSTIC: has key findings rules (acknowledge but continue)
Tone Adjustment - Prompt Files > MODE_PROMPT_DIAGNOSTIC: enforces explicit-only mode transitions
Tone Adjustment - Prompt Files > MODE_PROMPT_DIAGNOSTIC: allows at most one-word acknowledgment
Tone Adjustment - Behavior > SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE: prohibits repeating technician statements
Tone Adjustment - Behavior > SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE: prohibits filler phrases
Tone Adjustment - Behavior > SYSTEM_PROMPT_BASE: prohibits inventing facts
Chat Module Extractions > SSE Encoding > should encode data as SSE format
Chat Module Extractions > SSE Encoding > should create case event
Chat Module Extractions > SSE Encoding > should create done event
Chat Module Extractions > OpenAI Client Helpers > should build messages with system and history
Chat Module Extractions > OpenAI Client Helpers > should build messages with image attachments
Chat Module Extractions > OpenAI Client Helpers > should extract chunk content from OpenAI response
Chat Module Extractions > OpenAI Client Helpers > should handle empty/missing content
Chat Module Extractions > Attachment Validation > should accept empty attachments
Chat Module Extractions > Attachment Validation > should reject too many attachments
Chat Module Extractions > Attachment Validation > should filter valid attachments
Chat Module Extractions > Attachment Validation > should build vision instruction
Chat Module Extractions > Labor Override > should parse labor hours from message
Chat Module Extractions > Labor Override > should detect labor override intent
Chat Module Extractions > Labor Override > should normalize and format labor hours
Chat Module Extractions > Labor Override > should check canonical total labor line
Chat Module Extractions > Labor Override > should compute labor override request
Chat Module Extractions > Labor Override > should detect final report format
Chat Module Extractions > Output Policy > should enforce language policy by stripping translation
Chat Module Extractions > Output Policy > should extract primary report block
Chat Module Extractions > Output Policy > should build final report fallback
Chat Module Extractions > Output Policy > should build final report fallback with complaint context
Chat Module Extractions > Output Policy > should build final report fallback with translation
Chat Module Extractions > Output Policy > should apply diagnostic mode guard
Chat Module Extractions > Output Policy > should build diagnostic drift correction instruction
Chat Module Extractions > Output Policy > should build diagnostic drift fallback
Chat Module Extractions > Final Report Service > should build translation instruction
Chat Module Extractions > Final Report Service > should build final report request
Chat Module Extractions > Final Report Service > should build transition constraints
Chat Module Extractions > Logging > should log timing without throwing
Chat Module Extractions > Logging > should log flow without throwing
OpenAI Execution Service > retries invalid diagnostic output and falls back to the authoritative step
testcase.system-err:
[ModeValidator] Violations (case=case_1, mode=diagnostic): [ [32m'DIAGNOSTIC_DRIFT: Output looks like a final report while in diagnostic mode. Diagnostic mode must ask questions, not generate reports.'[39m, [32m'DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTION: Output does not contain a question'[39m, [32m'DIAGNOSTIC_MODE_GUARD: Diagnostic mode output must not use final report section format'[39m, [32m'STEP_COMPLIANCE: Response does not match active step wp_2. Expected question about: voltage, measure, water, pump, input'[39m ]
[ModeValidator] Violations (case=case_1, mode=diagnostic): [ [32m'DIAGNOSTIC_DRIFT: Output looks like a final report while in diagnostic mode. Diagnostic mode must ask questions, not generate reports.'[39m, [32m'DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTION: Output does not contain a question'[39m, [32m'DIAGNOSTIC_MODE_GUARD: Diagnostic mode output must not use final report section format'[39m, [32m'STEP_COMPLIANCE: Response does not match active step wp_2. Expected question about: voltage, measure, water, pump, input'[39m ]

testcase.name: OpenAI Execution Service > returns a valid labor override response without introducing flow logic
Chat Route Decomposition Services > parses request bodies and trims the message
Chat Route Decomposition Services > validates attachment bundles without hidden flow logic
Chat Route Decomposition Services > keeps prior language on short acknowledgements
Chat Route Decomposition Services > auto-switches tracked language only on strong non-ack evidence
Chat Route Decomposition Services > ensures the case with explicit language source resolution
Chat Route Decomposition Services > resolves stored mode normalization without semantic inference
Chat Route Decomposition Services > changes modes only on explicit commands
Chat Route Decomposition Services > builds bounded prompt constraints and preserves vision instruction
Chat Route Decomposition Services > validates primary responses and builds authoritative correction/fallback text
Chat Route Decomposition Services > validates labor override outputs and builds retry instructions
Chat Route Decomposition Services > builds the labor override execution plan with explicit final-report transport
Chat Route Decomposition Services > persists messages and diagnostic cleanup through the bounded service
detectSystem > detects water pump
detectSystem > detects furnace
detectSystem > detects roof AC
detectSystem > detects LP gas
detectSystem > detects refrigerator
detectSystem > detects slide-out
detectSystem > detects leveling system
detectSystem > detects inverter/converter
detectSystem > detects consumer appliance
detectSystem > returns null for unknown system
getProcedure > returns water_pump procedure
getProcedure > returns lp_gas procedure with correct step order
getProcedure > returns null for unknown system
getProcedure > all procedures have unique step IDs
getNextStep > returns first step when nothing completed
getNextStep > skips completed steps
getNextStep > skips unable-to-verify steps
getNextStep > respects prerequisites
getNextStep > LP gas: pressure test before ignition
getNextStep > returns null when all steps done
mapInitialMessageToSteps > maps voltage reading to completed step
mapInitialMessageToSteps > does not map ambiguous messages
mapInitialMessageToSteps > maps multiple LP gas steps from detailed initial message
buildProcedureContext > shows next step when nothing completed
buildProcedureContext > shows active step only (authoritative mode)
buildProcedureContext > handles unable-to-verify in progress count
buildProcedureContext > shows 'ALL STEPS COMPLETE' when done (no auto-transition)
buildProcedureContext > prevents cross-system questions
Integration: procedure-aware registry > initializes case with procedure from first message
Integration: procedure-aware registry > pre-completes steps from initial message
Integration: procedure-aware registry > buildRegistryContext uses procedure context when available
Integration: procedure-aware registry > falls back to legacy context when no procedure
Integration: procedure-aware registry > does not re-initialize on second message
Confusing input handling > cross-system bait: procedure context restricts to active system
Confusing input handling > unknown manufacturer: standard procedure used
detectAlreadyAnswered > detects 'already checked'
detectAlreadyAnswered > detects 'already told you'
detectAlreadyAnswered > detects 'already answered'
detectAlreadyAnswered > detects 'I already verified'
detectAlreadyAnswered > detects Russian 'уже проверил'
detectAlreadyAnswered > returns false for normal message
detectUnableToVerify > detects 'don't know'
detectUnableToVerify > detects 'can't check'
detectUnableToVerify > detects 'unable to verify'
detectUnableToVerify > detects 'can't see'
detectUnableToVerify > detects 'no tool to check'
detectUnableToVerify > detects Russian 'не могу проверить'
detectUnableToVerify > returns false for normal message
extractTopics > extracts voltage topic
extractTopics > extracts ground topic
extractTopics > extracts pump noise topic
extractTopics > extracts multiple topics
extractTopics > returns empty for unrelated message
detectKeyFinding > detects missing fan blade
detectKeyFinding > detects blower wheel damage
detectKeyFinding > detects seized motor
detectKeyFinding > detects zero current draw
detectKeyFinding > detects cracked housing
detectKeyFinding > returns null for normal diagnostic message
processUserMessage – procedure-aware > tracks completed steps when procedure is active
processUserMessage – procedure-aware > tracks unable-to-verify steps
processUserMessage – procedure-aware > still tracks legacy topics
processUserMessage – procedure-aware > detects key findings
shouldPivot > returns false when no key findings
shouldPivot > returns true when key finding is detected
No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > src/lib/chat/chat-request-preparer.ts does not import diagnostic authority modules
No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > src/lib/chat/chat-mode-resolver.ts does not import diagnostic authority modules
No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > src/lib/chat/prompt-context-builder.ts does not import diagnostic authority modules
No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > src/lib/chat/response-validation-service.ts does not import diagnostic authority modules
No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > src/lib/chat/final-report-flow-service.ts does not import diagnostic authority modules
No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > src/lib/chat/openai-execution-service.ts does not import diagnostic authority modules
No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > mode resolver refuses semantic mode inference
No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > fallback rendering only mirrors supplied authoritative step metadata
No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > route remains the boundary that invokes Context Engine directly
Chat Route Wiring > emits SSE success lifecycle once without duplicate done events
Chat Route Wiring > emits error and done once on upstream failure
Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > STRICT_CONTEXT_ENGINE is enabled by default
Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > Context Engine processMessage is always called in diagnostic mode
Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > legacy shouldPivot is NOT used for flow decisions
Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > replan is handled ONLY by Context Engine
testcase.system-out: [ContextEngine] Intent: New evidence (physical_damage): "wait, I found a refrigerant leak on the condenser..." [ContextEngine] Replan triggered: New physical_damage evidence after isolation: wait, I found a refrigerant leak on the condenser

testcase.name: Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > clarification is handled ONLY by Context Engine topic stack
Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > no dual-authority: isolation + new evidence = replan (not dual pivot)
testcase.system-out: [ContextEngine] Intent: New evidence (physical_damage): "Actually, I just noticed there's a hole in the eva..." [ContextEngine] Replan triggered: New physical_damage evidence after isolation: Actually, I just noticed there's a hole in the evaporator coil

testcase.name: Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > loop guard prevents legacy-style fallback loops
Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > step completion is synced from registry to Context Engine
Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > anti-loop directives are generated by Context Engine
Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > Context Engine result has valid structure for route consumption
Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > Context Engine handles invalid/missing context gracefully
Data Provider Isolation — Registry as Read-Only > buildRegistryContext returns step metadata (data only)
Data Provider Isolation — Registry as Read-Only > initializeCase provides procedure catalog (data only)
